scheme.title: Climate Data Hub Domain Vocabulary
scheme.description: Controlled vocabulary of high-level CDH domains used for catalog browse, filter, and group-by. The first concept on a record is treated as the primary domain and drives STAC sub-catalog placement. Subsequent concepts enable cross-cutting search.

concepts.label: Agricultural production
concepts.description: Production-focused agriculture: yields, harvested area, livestock numbers, and related production statistics.

concepts.label: Climate
concepts.description: Observed, reanalysis, projection, and scenario-based climate data including temperature, precipitation, and other climate variables.

concepts.label: Adaptation
concepts.description: Climate-change adaptation: vulnerability, exposure, risk assessment, and adaptation planning resources.

concepts.label: Mitigation
concepts.description: Climate-change mitigation: emissions, carbon stocks, sequestration, and mitigation pathways.

concepts.label: Hydrology
concepts.description: Hydrology, water resources, irrigation, and water-related hazards.

concepts.label: Socioeconomic
concepts.description: Population, livelihoods, poverty, food security, and socioeconomic indicators.
